name: Andersons, Inc.
business: Andersons, Inc. operates in two segments: Agribusiness and Renewables. The Agribusiness segment merchandises agricultural commodities, manufactures nutrients, and manages logistics. The Renewables segment produces and sells ethanol and co-products from four ethanol plants.

exposures.sentence: The Agribusiness segment is a diversified business focusing on capturing profits through relationships with agricultural producers and end users as both a supplier and customer.
The Renewables segment produces, purchases and sells ethanol and co-products.
This includes merchandising and managing logistics across a wide range of commodities as well as being a manufacturer, distributor, and retailer of agricultural and related plant nutrients.
We also handle bulk agricultural fertilizers, produce specialized high-value nutrient products, and service a variety of industrial and consumer markets with related products.

With the increased regulations and opportunity of electric vehicles comes the transitional risk that biofuels are in lower demand due to environmental concerns with climate change and changing consumer behavior.
The Company is at risk of cyber-incidents or other security breaches that could undermine our ability to operate effectively.

catalysts.event: Acquired remaining 49.9% ownership interest in The Andersons Marathon Holdings LLC
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, the Company acquired the remaining 49.9% ownership interest in The Andersons Marathon Holdings LLC ("TAMH").
